inputs.label: Angle Value
inputs.businessContext: The magnitude of the angle to compute the sine of.

businessContext_i18n.en: The magnitude of the angle to compute the sine of.
businessContext_i18n.de: Größe des Winkels, dessen Sinus berechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ampleur de l'angle pour calculer le sinus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Magnitud del ángulo para calcular el seno

inputs.label: Angle Unit (0=Degrees, 1=Radians)
inputs.businessContext: Select 0 if the angle is in degrees, 1 if in radians.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select 0 if the angle is in degrees, 1 if in radians.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Açı derece ise 0, radyan ise 1 seçin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie 0, wenn der Winkel in Grad vorliegt, 1 wenn im Bogenmaß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez 0 si l'angle est en degrés, 1 si en radians.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione 0 si el ángulo está en grados, 1 si está en radianes
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر 0 إذا كانت الزاوية بالدرجات، 1 إذا كانت بالراديان.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the sine output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the sine output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sinüs çıktısı için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Sinusausgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat du sinus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida del seno

businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı genlik çarpma faktörü (a*sin(x) için).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de multiplication d'amplitude optionnel (pour a*sin(x)).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de multiplicación de amplitud opcional (para a*sin(x))

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
